title: Khaitan & Co acts on OZi fundraise
description: Ozi Technologies Private Limited has raised $6.2 million from a fundraise led by RTP Global SEA Limited, with participation from existing investors Blume Ventures, Huddle Ventures, Zeropearl VC, and some angel investors.Khaitan & Co advised lead investor RTP Global on this fundraise.The core transaction team consisted of Nidhi Killawala (Partner), Akhairaj Singh (Senior Associate), Shatakshi Gupta (Senior Associate) and Anannya Wal (Associate).Nirupam Lodha (Partner), Shivangi Narang (Princi
